zh.lifeSummary: 當Udard Fraser於從1128年到1131年出生在蘇格蘭皮布萊爾德盧米爾時，他的父親Gilbert Fraser33歲，母親Margaret Alpin29歲。他於大約1150年與Margaret Verch Kylvert在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1169年在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾德盧米爾，埋葬在蘇格蘭皮布萊爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Udard Fraser于从1128年到1131年出生在苏格兰皮布萊爾德盧米爾时，他的父亲Gilbert Fraser33岁，母亲Margaret Alpin29岁。他于大约1150年与Margaret Verch Kylvert在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1169年在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾德盧米爾，埋葬在苏格兰皮布萊爾。

nameMeanings.name: Fraser
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: apparently a nickname from Anglo-Norman French fraser(e), fresere ‘strawberry plant’. Fresel and Frisel, from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, are early variants of the Fraser surname, the modern Gaelicized form of which is Friseal. See Frizzell . The crest on the Scottish family's coat of arms takes the form of a strawberry plant, but its antiquity is unknown. Claims of a habitational derivation, in particular from a place called la Frézelière in Anjou (France), are attractive but they lack verifiable evidence.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: There are two clans Fraser in Scotland, with common ancestry going back to Simon Fraser of Keith in East Lothian, who lived in the 12th century. One of these clans has its seat at Philorth Castle (subsequently re-named Cairnbulg) on the northeast coast of Scotland. Sir Alexander Fraser, 8th laird of Philorth (c. 1536–1623) converted the fishing village of Faithlie into the burgh of Fraserburgh in the 1590s. The other clan is Fraser of Lovat, associated mainly with the city of Inverness are. They are descended from Simon Fraser, a younger son, who lived in the early 14th century. In Gaelic, the head of Clan Fraser of Lovat is known as Mac Shimi ‘son of Simon’.

variants.name: Frayser
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frazer
meanings: Variant of   Fraser  , associated chiefly with northern Ireland.

variants.name: Frashier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frizzell
meanings: English and Irish: nickname from Old French fresel, frisel ‘lace, ribbon, braid, brooch, frill, ruff’, for someone with an ornate style of dress, or ‘object of little value’ (a diminutive of frese, of ancient Germanic origin).
Scottish: from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, an alternative form of Fraser .

variants.name: Frazier
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasher
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .
Possibly an altered form of German Fratzscher (see Frutchey ).

en.lifeSummary: When Udard Fraser was born from 1128 to 1131, in Drumelzier, Peeblesshire, Scotland, his father, Gilbert Fraser, was 33 and his mother, Margaret Alpin, was 29. He married Margaret Verch Kylvert about 1150, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1169, in Drumelzier, Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, and was buried in Peeblesshire, Scotland.

fr.Drumelzier, Peebleshire, Scotland: Drumelzier, Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Udard Fraser est né du 1128 au 1131, à Drumelzier, Valle de Twede, Écosse, son père, Gilbert Fraser, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margaret Alpin, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Verch Kylvert environ 1150, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1169, à Drumelzier, Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Valle de Twede, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Udard Fraser von 1128 bis 1131 in Drumelzier, Peeblesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert Fraser 33 und seine Mutter Margaret Alpin 29. Er hat um 1150 in Scotland Margaret Verch Kylvert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1169 in Drumelzier, Peeblesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Peeblesshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Udard Fraser è nato il da 1128 a 1131 nel Drumelzier, Peeblesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Gilbert Fraser, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Alpin, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Verch Kylvert circa 1150, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1169, nel Drumelzier, Peeblesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Peeblesshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Udard Fraserがから1128年まで1131年にスコットランドペエブレシュアイアドルメルズイエルで生まれた時，父Gilbert Fraserは33歳，母Margaret Alpinは29歳であった。約1150年にスコットランドでMargaret Verch Kylvertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1169年にイギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアドルメルズイエルで死去し，スコットランドペエブレシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Udard Fraser(이)가 1128년 부터 1131년 까지 스컷랜드 피블레실르 드루지어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Fraser(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Alpin(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1150년 스컷랜드에서 Margaret Verch Kylvert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1169년 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르 드루지어에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피블레실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Udard Fraser nasceu de 1128 a 1131, em Drumelzier, Peeblesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Gilbert Fraser, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Alpin, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Verch Kylvert aproximadamente 1150, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1169, em Drumelzier, Peeblesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Peeblesshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Udard Fraser родился с 1128 по 1131 в местности друмелзиир, пиблессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Gilbert Fraser было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Alpin, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Verch Kylvert около 1150 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1169 г. в местности друмелзиир, пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности пиблессхир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Udard Fraser nació desde 1128 hasta 1131, en Drumelzier, Peeblesshire, Scotland, su papá, Gilbert Fraser, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margaret Alpin, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Margaret Verch Kylvert aproximadamente 1150, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1169, en Drumelzier, Peeblesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Peeblesshire, Scotland.
